description: Date Core may use as PIT/manual snapshot effective date. For monthly reports use next trading day or report-specific effective policy after review.
Date printed in source or official page trandate; must not be later than the effective date policy permits.
Local archive path or manifest placeholder. Raw PDFs are normally not committed.
Official URL, archive snapshot URL, or UI path used to obtain the source.
TW stock ticker from the source row.
Security name from the source row.
Holding weight percent if available. Leave blank if source only gives quantities or constituents.
Manual/proxy source classification; never exact for this route.
Always false for Yuanta 0050 manual/proxy rows.
Quality grade based on source date, row scope, and review level.
Limitations, review comments, source-date caveats, and future-data checks.
allowed_or_example: Do not use current row for historical effective date.
